title: Path validation and binary file detection utilities
purpose: Provides functions to validate file paths are within a project root and to detect if a file is binary by checking for null bytes.

steps.content: Resolve the provided file path and project root to absolute paths.
Verify that the resolved file path starts with the resolved project root or equals it.
IF the path does not start with the project root, throw an error indicating path escape.
Resolve the real path of the file to handle symbolic links.
Verify that the real path starts with the resolved project root or equals it.
IF the real path does not start with the project root, throw an error indicating path escape.
Open the file for reading using a file handle.
Read up to 8KB of data from the file into a buffer.
IF the file is empty, return false indicating it's not binary.
Search for null bytes within the read data.
IF null bytes are found, return true indicating the file is binary.
ELSE return false indicating the file is not binary.
Close the file handle in the finally block to ensure cleanup.
